note: HARNESS FLOOR / drop-zone conform probe: A with an identity transform must render == imageA in BOTH engines. CLOSED 2026-07-15: the TS drop-zone conform now stretches the base full-frame drop-zone source to fill the frame (compositor conformDropZoneSource, FCT_CONFORM_FILL). Was psnr 17.58 (TS blitted the 1854x1042 source at native size, ~19/33px black border); now psnr 43.31 (mae 1.04), matching headless. expect_identity=true: headless SHOULD equal input for a no-op transform, so PASS is decided by the headless-vs-TS psnr alone (the hvi schema-guard is skipped).

Layer Position X +300px (Motion centre origin, +x=right). WORKING: both engines apply it; ~19dB residual = a sub-pixel/edge-sampling divergence in the compositor blit, the first concrete transform capability to close.
Layer Position Y +200px. WORKING (hvi 71): verifies the y-axis sign (Motion +y=UP). ~18dB residual, same blit-sampling gap as position.x.

Scale to 50% (ratio 0.5). REAL schema decoded 2026-07-15: Transform id=100 > Scale id=105 (X/Y/Z id 1/2/3), RATIO not percent, default=1 (Movements/Scale.motr:213). Earlier injector used id=103/default=100 (percent) -> headless IGNORED it (hvi~0.9).

Rotate 30° about Z (in-plane spin). Transform id=100 > Rotation id=109 (X/Y/Z id 1/2/3). UNITS = RADIANS in the .motr (VERIFIED: Movements/Rotate.motr Z keyframe = 1.5707963267948966 = π/2 = 90°); the injector now converts the catalog's degrees→radians (was emitting the degree value raw, so both engines read it as radians and a Z cap still PASSed by mutual agreement but at the wrong angle). PASS psnr 36.88.
Transition A Opacity 0.5 over Transition B (Blending>Opacity id=202). Tests the source-over composite fraction.

Non-uniform X-only scale 0.5 (Scale id=105 X-child only, Y/Z default 1). PASS (psnr 42.41, hvi 75.6): the engine applies anisotropic scale (horizontal squash to 50%) matching headless FCP, distinct from the uniform scale.half cap. Verifies the per-axis Scale schema + the compositor's non-uniform affine.
